problem_solved: Healthcare providers struggle with inefficient patient communication and manual triage. Visiba provides a digital care platform with AI-powered triage to streamline patient-provider interactions.
who_buys_it: Public and private healthcare providers, clinics, hospitals, and health systems
key_features: AI-powered triage system for patient routing
Video consultation platform with secure messaging
Multi-party calls with patients, colleagues, and interpreters
business_model: B2B SaaS platform with subscription-based pricing
why_varden_should_care: Strong replicability potential - AI triage and digital care platform model can be adapted to other markets with healthcare provider networks. Founded in 2014, proven in Scandinavian market.

problem_solved: Patients face long wait times for doctor appointments while GPs struggle with administrative burdens. Kry offers digital reception and practice management solutions to help GPs work more efficiently.
who_buys_it: General practitioners, GP practices, health centers, and healthcare systems
key_features: Digital reception and automated patient communication
Cloud-based medical records system
Video consultation and remote care tools
business_model: Hybrid model - B2C telemedicine services + B2B practice management solutions for healthcare providers
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - digital GP practice management and telemedicine model can be applied to markets with GP shortage or inefficient primary care systems. Strong track record across multiple Nordic countries.

problem_solved: Patients need quick access to healthcare while clinics struggle to manage patient flow efficiently. Min Doktor provides 24/7 digital healthcare access with chat-based consultations.
who_buys_it: Healthcare consumers (B2C) and employers for occupational health services
key_features: 24/7 chat-based consultations with healthcare professionals
Digital prescriptions and appointment booking
Physical clinics for in-person care when needed
business_model: B2C direct-to-patient services with subscription/pay-per-visit, plus B2B employer health services
why_varden_should_care: Moderate replicability - hybrid digital-physical healthcare model with patient engagement focus. Chat-first approach can be adapted to markets with high smartphone penetration and digital health readiness.

problem_solved: Patients need integrated healthcare services with easy access to their health information and providers. Pihlajalinna offers a comprehensive health app for managing care journey.
who_buys_it: Healthcare consumers (B2C), employers for occupational health, and through public health system partnerships
key_features: Mobile health app with chat reception and health records
Electronic prescriptions and appointment booking
Integration with occupational health and travel clinics
business_model: Hybrid B2C/B2B - direct patient services plus employer and public health partnerships
why_varden_should_care: Moderate replicability - integrated health app and care coordination model can be adapted to markets with strong primary care networks. Focus on patient data portability and engagement.

problem_solved: Patients need convenient access to healthcare services and their health data. Mehiläinen provides a comprehensive patient portal (OmaMehiläinen) with digital clinic services.
who_buys_it: Healthcare consumers (B2C), employers for occupational health, and specialized care services
key_features: OmaMehiläinen patient portal with digital clinic (Digiklinikka)
24/7 remote healthcare access and prescription renewal
Comprehensive health records and care coordination
business_model: Hybrid B2C/B2B - direct patient services, employer health plans, and specialized medical services
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - comprehensive patient portal and digital clinic model can be adapted to markets seeking to digitize healthcare delivery. Strong focus on patient satisfaction measurement (NPS).

problem_solved: Healthcare systems lack effective tools for preventive care and disease risk assessment. Nightingale provides AI-powered blood analysis technology for predicting disease risks.
who_buys_it: Healthcare providers, health systems, and public health organizations for preventive care programs
key_features: Blood analysis technology for disease risk prediction
Prevention of cardiovascular diseases and chronic conditions
Integration with public healthcare systems for population health
business_model: B2B SaaS - providing risk assessment technology to healthcare providers and health systems
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - preventive care and risk assessment technology can be applied to markets with aging populations and rising chronic disease burden. Strong clinical validation and regulatory pathway.

problem_solved: Patients need a unified portal to access healthcare services, manage appointments, and view health records. 1177 provides a national patient portal for Sweden's healthcare system.
who_buys_it: Public healthcare system (government-funded, free to citizens)
key_features: Electronic health records access and prescription management
Appointment booking and messaging with healthcare providers
Health information and self-service tools
business_model: Government-funded public service (not commercial, but serves as infrastructure model)
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - national patient portal model can be adapted to other markets implementing healthcare digitization. Demonstrates patient engagement at scale with integrated services.

problem_solved: Norwegian citizens need a centralized digital platform to access health services and manage their health data. Helsenorge provides the national health portal for Norway's healthcare system.
who_buys_it: Public healthcare system (government-funded, free to citizens)
key_features: Digital health services and prescription renewal
Appointment booking and proxy access for family members
Health information and vaccination records
business_model: Government-funded public service (infrastructure model for national health system)
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - national health portal model demonstrates patient engagement infrastructure at scale. Can be adapted to other countries implementing digital health strategies.
